message:
Add env var policy configuration per spec 4.2

Introduces EnvVarPolicy type with four modes: Default (filter sensitive),
All (inherit everything), None (clean env), CoreOnly (PATH/HOME/etc).
ExecCommand now delegates to filteredEnvWithPolicy based on the
LocalExecutionEnvironment.EnvPolicy field.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
